kernel_logic: Security is a continuous architectural process, never a final product or a purchasable SKU. User data are toxic liabilities to be minimized, not assets to be accumulated. Radical transparency is the only functional antidote to the inevitability of data exposure. The blast radius of a system is directly proportional to its data retention policy.

decision_gates.if: A new data point is proposed for collection
decision_gates.then: Verify if operational utility outweighs the liability risk; if not, reject.
Prioritize architectural hardening and transparent protocols over proprietary black-box software.
Migrate immediately to radical transparency with the users.

semantic_anchor: Data minimization and iterative hardening as the core mechanism of architectural protection.
